mapper.select:
select p.id, p.case_no, p.name, p.gender, p.height, p.birthday, p.phone, p.id_card, p.address, p.is_report, p.create_time, p.create_by, p.update_time, p.update_by, p.remark from patient p where p.is_del = 0 and p.is_report = 1
and p.case_no like concat('%', #{caseNo}, '%')
and p.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and p.phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
order by p.id desc
mapper.update: update patient set is_del = 1 where id = #{patientId}
mapper.select:
select report.patient_id, report.case_no, report.name, report.gender, report.height, report.birthday, report.age, report.phone, report.id_card, report.address, report.record_id, report.user_id, report.total_score, report.result, report.suggest, report.create_time, report.scale_id, report.scale_name, report.scale_code, report.scale_total_score, report.item_score, report.remark, case report.scale_code when 'exercise' then '-' when 'vision' then '4分' when 'visual_function' then '3分' when 'listening' then '4分' when 'cognition' then '-' when 'depression' then '-' when 'anxiety' then '-' when 'stay_at_home' then '14分' when 'fall' then '-' when 'frailty' then '≥3项衰弱；<2项衰弱前期；0项无衰弱' when 'incontinence' then '-' when 'constipation' then '-' when 'sleep' then '-' when 'chronic' then '-' when 'pressure' then '-' when 'medication' then '<5种无；5-9种轻度；≥10种重度' when 'swallow' then '-' when 'nutrition' then '≤11分为营养不良风险' when 'sarcopenia' then '男性＜34cm，女性＜33cm为阳性' when 'delirium' then '-' else concat(report.scale_total_score, '分') end as normal_range, case when report.scale_code = 'exercise' and report.item_score > 0 then '建议进行体能状况评估 B3' when report.scale_code = 'exercise' then '阴性' when report.scale_code = 'vision' and report.item_score >= 4 then '正常' when report.scale_code = 'vision' then '≤3分应进一步到眼科评估' when report.scale_code = 'visual_function' and report.item_score >= 3 then '视功能良好' when report.scale_code = 'visual_function' then '≤2分应进一步到眼科评估' when report.scale_code = 'listening' and report.item_score >= 4 then '听力正常' when report.scale_code = 'listening' then '≤3分应进一步到耳鼻喉科评估' when report.scale_code = 'cognition' and report.item_score >= 3 then '阴性' when report.scale_code = 'cognition' then '建议进行认知功能评估 WS/T484 C1' when report.scale_code = 'depression' and report.item_score > 0 then '建议进行抑郁评估 WS/T802 B4' when report.scale_code = 'depression' then '阴性' when report.scale_code = 'anxiety' and report.item_score > 0 then '建议进行焦虑评估 WS/T802 B3' when report.scale_code = 'anxiety' then '阴性' when report.scale_code = 'stay_at_home' and report.item_score >= 14 then '正常' when report.scale_code = 'stay_at_home' then '得分越低，风险越大 B9' when report.scale_code = 'fall' and report.item_score > 0 then '建议进行跌倒风险评估 MZT 185 A1' when report.scale_code = 'fall' then '阴性' when report.scale_code = 'frailty' and report.item_score >= 3 then '衰弱 B10' when report.scale_code = 'frailty' and report.item_score > 0 then '衰弱前期 B10' when report.scale_code = 'frailty' then '无衰弱' when report.scale_code = 'incontinence' and report.item_score > 0 then '建议进行尿失禁评估 B11' when report.scale_code = 'incontinence' then '阴性' when report.scale_code = 'constipation' and report.item_score > 0 then '建议进行便秘评估 B12' when report.scale_code = 'constipation' then '阴性' when report.scale_code = 'sleep' and report.item_score > 0 then '建议进行睡眠障碍评估 B13' when report.scale_code = 'sleep' then '阴性' when report.scale_code = 'chronic' and report.item_score > 0 then '建议进行慢性疼痛评估 B14' when report.scale_code = 'chronic' then '阴性' when report.scale_code = 'pressure' and report.item_score > 0 then '建议进行压力性损伤风险评估 B16' when report.scale_code = 'pressure' then '阴性' when report.scale_code = 'medication' and report.item_score >= 2 then '重度多重用药' when report.scale_code = 'medication' and report.item_score = 1 then '轻度多重用药' when report.scale_code = 'medication' then '无多重用药' when report.scale_code = 'swallow' and report.item_score > 0 then '建议进行吞咽障碍评估 B17' when report.scale_code = 'swallow' then '阴性' when report.scale_code = 'nutrition' and report.item_score <= 11 then '建议进行营养不良评估及诊断 B18/B19' when report.scale_code = 'nutrition' then '正常营养状况' when report.scale_code = 'sarcopenia' and report.item_score > 0 then '建议进行肌肉力量和躯体功能评估' when report.scale_code = 'sarcopenia' then '阴性' when report.scale_code = 'delirium' and report.item_score > 0 then 'B21' when report.scale_code = 'delirium' then '阴性' else '请结合量表规则判断' end as tip from ( select p.id as patient_id, p.case_no, p.name, p.gender, p.height, p.birthday, timestampdiff(year, p.birthday, curdate()) as age, p.phone, p.id_card, p.address,
r.id as record_id, r.user_id, r.total_score, r.result, r.suggest, r.create_time,
s.id as scale_id, s.scale_name, s.code as scale_code, s.total_score as scale_total_score, s.remark, coalesce(sum( case when json_type(json_extract(r.answer_json, concat('$."', q.id, '"'))) = 'OBJECT' then cast(json_unquote(json_extract(r.answer_json, concat('$."', q.id, '".score'))) as signed) else cast(json_unquote(json_extract(r.answer_json, concat('$."', q.id, '"'))) as signed) end ), 0) as item_score from cag_record r left join patient p on r.patient_id = p.id left join cag_scale s on s.del_flag = '0' left join cag_question q on q.scale_id = s.id and q.del_flag = '0' where r.id = #{recordId} and r.del_flag = '0' group by p.id, p.case_no, p.name, p.gender, p.height, p.birthday, p.phone, p.id_card, p.address, r.id, r.user_id, r.total_score, r.result, r.suggest, r.create_time, s.id, s.scale_name, s.code, s.total_score, s.remark ) report order by report.scale_id
